mapper.select: select a.biz_id AS ID , biz_nm AS NAME , b.par_biz_id AS PAR_ID , A.EDIT_YN , MA01_6 AS CODE , BIZ_DESC AS DESCRIPTION , C.* from c_biz a left outer join MMA010TB c on ( a.biz_id=c.RT30_1) , C_PKG_BIZ_MAP b where a.biz_id=b.biz_id and b.pkg_id=6 and (b.par_biz_id=#{PAR_ID} or b.par_biz_id in ( select biz_id from C_PKG_BIZ_MAP where par_biz_id=#{PAR_ID}) ) ORDER BY NVL(MA01_6,0), b.par_biz_id asc ,a.biz_id ASC
select a.biz_id AS ID , biz_nm AS NAME , BIZ_DESC AS DESCRIPTION from c_biz a WHERE BIZ_ID = #{BIZ_ID}

SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'B' || B.BIZ_ID as CODE, B.BIZ_ID AS ID, BIZ_NM AS NAME, -1 AS TYPE, #{PAR_ID} AS PAR_ID, BIZ_DESC AS DESCRIPTION, A.DISPLAY_ORDER FROM C_PKG_BIZ_MAP A, C_BIZ B WHERE A.PAR_BIZ_ID = #{PAR_ID} AND A.BIZ_ID = B.BIZ_ID AND A.PKG_ID = 6 UNION ALL SELECT 'T' || A.RT31_1 as CODE, A.RT31_1 as id, RT32_4 as NAME, RT32_3 AS TYPE, 'B' || RS20_1 AS PAR_ID, RT32_C AS DESCRIPTION, M1.DISPLAY_ORDER FROM C_PKG_BIZ_MAP M1, BRT310TB A, BRT320TB B WHERE A.RT31_1=B.RT31_1 AND A.RT31_3=B.RT32_1 AND M1.PAR_BIZ_ID = #{PAR_ID} AND M1.BIZ_ID = A.RS20_1 AND M1.PKG_ID = 6 ) A ORDER BY PAR_ID, DISPLAY_ORDER

SELECT A.RS18_1 , A.RS19_1 AS CODE , RS1A_2 AS NAME ,RS19_3 FROM BRS190TB A, BRS1A0TB B WHERE A.RS18_1 = B.RS18_1 AND A.RS19_1 = B.RS19_1 AND A.RS19_5 = 0 AND B.RS1A_1 = #{param0} AND A.RS18_1 = #{param1}
SELECT A.RS18_1 , A.RS19_1 AS CODE , RS1A_2 AS NAME ,RS19_3 FROM BRS190TB A, BRS1A0TB B WHERE A.RS18_1 = B.RS18_1 AND A.RS19_1 = B.RS19_1 AND A.RS19_5 = 0 AND B.RS1A_1 = 'ko-KR' AND A.RS18_1 = #{CD}

SELECT '' AS TOBE_CD, B.MA01_6 AS CUR_CODE, (SELECT BIZ_NM FROM C_BIZ WHERE biz_id = D.PAR_BIZ_ID) AS CATG_NM, BIZ_NM AS NAME, BIZ_DESC AS REMARK, CASE WHEN B.MA01_A = '1' THEN '개인' WHEN B.MA01_A = '2' THEN '법인' ELSE '개인,법인' END AS INDV_CORP, CASE WHEN B.MA01_7 = '1' THEN '계좌' ELSE '거래' END AS RULE_TYP, 'Y' AS EDIT_YN, NVL(C.SCHE,'일간') AS BAT_SCH, (select LISTAGG(RT33_3,',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY RT33_2) AS RETU FROM BRT330TB WHERE RT31_1=B.RT31_1 AND RT32_1=1) AS STD_ITM, B.MA01_2 AS RS31_1_1, (SELECT MAX(RS3E_2) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RS32_1 DESC ,RS34_1 DESC) FROM BRS3E0TB WHERE RS31_1=B.MA01_2) AS QUERY1, B.MA01_3 AS RS31_1_2, (SELECT MAX(RS3E_2) KEEP(DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RS32_1 DESC ,RS34_1 DESC) FROM BRS3E0TB WHERE RS31_1=B.MA01_3) AS QUERY2 FROM C_BIZ A, MMA010TB B, (SELECT MA07_1, LISTAGG((SELECT RS15_2 FROM BRS150TB WHERE RS11_1=9 AND RS15_1 = MA06_1), ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY MA07_1) AS SCHE FROM MMA070TB GROUP BY MA07_1) C, C_PKG_BIZ_MAP D WHERE A.BIZ_ID=B.RT30_1 AND B.MA01_6 = C.MA07_1(+) AND A.biz_id=D.biz_id and (D.par_biz_id=#{BIZ_ID} or D.par_biz_id in ( select biz_id from C_PKG_BIZ_MAP where par_biz_id=#{BIZ_ID}) ) ORDER BY D.PAR_BIZ_ID, B.MA01_6
